c.d: Total number of movies, TV shows, and exclusive content available on the platform
c.s: Platform databases, third-party content tracking services, official announcements

c.d: Maximum supported video resolution and streaming quality (4K, HDR, Dolby Vision support)
c.s: Platform specifications, device compatibility lists, technical documentation

c.d: Number of active users streaming content monthly, indicating platform popularity and reliability
c.s: Company reports, market research firms, industry analytics

c.d: Number of supported devices and platforms (Smart TVs, mobile, gaming consoles, web browsers)
c.s: Official compatibility lists, app stores, device manufacturer partnerships

c.d: Cost-effectiveness based on subscription price versus content quality and quantity offered
c.s: Official pricing pages, promotional offers, feature comparison analysis
